mapper.insert: insert into aiw_investment_feedback (biz_id, user_biz_id, target_type, target_biz_id, report_biz_id, prompt_biz_id, prompt_code, prompt_version, backtest_biz_id, feedback_action, reason_code, comment_text, metadata, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{targetType}, #{targetBizId}, #{reportBizId}, #{promptBizId}, #{promptCode}, #{promptVersion}, #{backtestBizId}, #{feedbackAction}, #{reasonCode}, #{commentText}, #{metadata}, #{createdAt})
